creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 176842
Patch to update deskutils/xfce4-notifyd

- Update to 0.3.4
- Re-generate patch (with 'make makepatch')

There are 2 new features [1], enable in settings window:
- "Do not disturb" mode
- Notification-muting on a per application level

[1] https://git.xfce.org/apps/xfce4-notifyd/tag/?id=xfce4-notifyd-0.3.4
